name: Push-ups
instructions: Place hands shoulder-width apart. Keep body straight. Lower chest to floor and push back up.

name: Pull-ups
instructions: Hang from bar with overhand grip. Pull chest to bar. Lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Rows
instructions: Brace on bench. Row dumbbell to hip. Keep back flat.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead from shoulder height. Lock out arms.

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Use chair or parallel bars. Lower body with elbows at 90 degrees. Push up.

name: Resistance Band Bicep Curl
instructions: Stand on band. Curl both hands to shoulder height. Squeeze at top.

name: Squats (Bodyweight)
instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart. Lower until thighs parallel. Drive through heels.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell at chest. Squat deep with chest up.

name: Lunges
instructions: Step forward, lower back knee to near floor. Alternate legs.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent. Push hips up, squeeze glutes at top.

name: Calf Raises
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width. Rise onto toes slowly. Lower controlled.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Lean back against wall. Lower until thighs are parallel to floor. Hold.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold push-up position on forearms. Keep body in straight line. Don't drop hips.

name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent. Curl shoulders toward knees. Don't pull neck.

name: Russian Twists
instructions: Sit at 45 degrees. Twist torso side to side. Add weight for challenge.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: In push-up position. Drive knees to chest alternately at speed.

name: Leg Raises
instructions: Lie flat. Raise legs to 90 degrees. Lower slowly without touching floor.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Jump feet wide while raising arms overhead. Return to start. Repeat rapidly.

name: Burpees
instructions: Squat, kick feet back, do push-up, jump feet in, jump up with arms overhead.

name: High Knees
instructions: Jog in place bringing knees to hip height alternately. Pump arms.

name: Jump Rope (skipping)
instructions: Turn rope with wrists. Jump with both feet. Find your rhythm.

name: Brisk Walking
instructions: Walk at 5-6 km/h. Swing arms. Maintain upright posture.

name: Jogging
instructions: Run at comfortable pace (7-9 km/h). Land midfoot. Relax shoulders.

name: Dumbbell Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips. Keep back flat. Drive hips forward to stand.

name: Superman Hold
instructions: Lie face down. Lift arms and legs simultaneously. Squeeze back. Hold 2 seconds.

name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions: On all fours. Arch back up (cat), then dip belly down (cow). Flow slowly.

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel, sit back on heels, extend arms forward. Hold and breathe deeply.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Lunge forward, drop back knee. Push hips forward. Hold 30 seconds each side.

name: Bicycle Crunches
instructions: Lie on back. Alternate bringing elbow to opposite knee while cycling legs.

name: Box Jumps
instructions: Stand before box. Jump explosively landing softly with bent knees. Step down.
